# RVA James

> Family-focused James River conditions dashboard for Richmond, VA.
> Consolidates fragmented public-sector data sources (USGS gage,
> NWS weather, RVA DPU sewer overflow events, JRA water quality)
> into kid-safe guidance tailored to a family's youngest child.
> AI is used only for interpretation of stored sensor data — never
> for fetching. Always defer to official emergency channels.

## What the site provides

- Live river conditions: gage height, discharge (cfs), water temperature
- Active and forecast (today + 3 days) advisories: flood warnings,
  combined sewer overflow events, water quality results
- Per-access-point activity guidance (swim / kayak / rock-hop / hike /
  bridge crossing) calibrated to the family's youngest child age
- Trip-prep checklist generated from current conditions

## Data sources

- USGS Water Services — gage 02037500 (Richmond Locks), 02035000
  (Cartersville upstream)
- NOAA NWS Richmond office — hourly forecast + flood alerts
- NOAA AHPS — river-stage forecast for the gage
- City of Richmond DPU — combined sewer overflow event tracking via
  EmNet public map (apps.emnet.net/richmond-pub-map-app)
- James River Association — water quality program (E. coli, enterococcus)

## AI involvement

Anthropic Claude Haiku 4.5 (default) and Sonnet 4.6 (escalation when
an active advisory has severity high or extreme) interpret the
deterministic sensor data into plain-language guidance. The AI never
fetches data, only narrates it. Every interpretation is cached and
de-duplicated by prompt hash to keep cost bounded.

## Key endpoints

- /sitemap.xml — canonical URL list
- /safety — official safety references (AAP / NPS / USCG sources)
- /status — observability: last ingest per source, daily AI cost
- /locations/[slug] — 9 access points (belle-isle, pony-pasture,
  texas-beach, browns-island, mayo-island, shiplock-trail,
  north-bank-trail, buttermilk-trail, pump-house)
- /api/metro-summary?date=YYYY-MM-DD&age=<bucket> — metro AI summary
- /api/location-interpretation?slug=<slug>&date=...&age=... — per-location AI

## Age buckets

0-2 · 3-5 · 6-9 · 10-13 · 14+ · none (no youngest child / adult default)

## Limitations and caveats

- AI-generated guidance is informational, NOT medical/professional advice
- Conditions can change faster than the data refresh cadence
- For emergencies, call 911 or check NWS directly
- Twice-daily CSO ingest cadence means some staleness is normal — the
  UI surfaces a "Data as of Nh ago" label to communicate freshness

## Crawler notes

- robots.txt at /robots.txt has explicit AI crawler rules
- Stable URLs: location slugs are permanent; date params accept
  YYYY-MM-DD; age params are the bucket enum above
- Hreflang: this site serves a single English-language locale; any
  hreflang tags found in the source are bugs to be removed
